text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 177 

NDC 

LABEL: National Drug Code 

DESCRIPTION: A code in National Drug Code (NDC) format indicating the drug, device, or medical supply covered by 
this claim. 

SHORT NAME: NDC 

LONG NAME: NDC 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 13 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): All line files 

VALUES: 11-digit numeric value, can include leading zeros. 
Ex. 00002060440 
Null/missing =
